creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report! The issue has been fixed by limiting devel/py-gitosis to Python 2.7 only. Some errors might be fixed by using "0o755" instead of 0755 for octal values as you have suggested.

But beside that devel/py-gitosis uses some built-in modules (e.g. cStringIO) that are gone in Python 3. Upstream needs to adapt the code to Python 3 but the repository seems to be a bit stale because there has been no new release since 2015.
